ranked_insights.topic: Flutter MCP Server for AI Coding Assistants
ranked_insights.action: Enable Dart/Flutter MCP Server in project. Configure Claude Code to use it for widget inspection, test generation, and code navigation. Add MCP server config to settings.json.

ranked_insights.topic: Layered MVVM Architecture with Repository Pattern
ranked_insights.action: Adopt official Flutter 3-layer architecture: UI Layer (widgets) -> Data Layer (repositories wrapping Firebase) -> DI Layer. Enforce via CLAUDE.md conventions and directory structure (lib/ui/, lib/data/, lib/di/).

ranked_insights.topic: Hybrid Agent Architecture for Flutter Development
ranked_insights.action: Use ReAct planning for exploratory tasks (UI debugging, widget tree inspection) and typed deterministic tool execution for known workflows (build, test, deploy). Implement 3-tier granularity: micro (firebase deploy), medium (dart edit/test), macro (cold start pipeline).

ranked_insights.topic: TDD Workflow with Flutter Widget/Unit/Integration Tests
ranked_insights.action: Enforce RED-GREEN-IMPROVE cycle. Widget tests for UI, unit tests for repositories/viewmodels, integration_test for E2E flows. Target 80%+ coverage. Use flutter test --coverage.

Repository layer wraps Firebase services (auth, firestore, storage). ViewModel consumes repositories. UI observes via Riverpod providers. Firebase Auth streams integrate with reactive model. Use firebase_ui packages for rapid scaffolding.
Use flutter_riverpod + riverpod_generator for compile-safe, auto-dispose providers. No BuildContext dependency. Progressive: ChangeNotifier for simple cases, Riverpod for app-wide state.

Implement structured error recovery: build_failure (clean-rebuild max 2 cycles), runtime_crash (device logs -> error boundary), test_failure (re-run verbose -> check goldens), firebase_error (emulator -> config -> rules), platform_specific (isolate -> native build).

ranked_insights.topic: Security Review for Firebase Auth & Firestore Rules
ranked_insights.action: Run security review on Firebase auth config, Firestore security rules, API key management, and secure storage before any deploy. Validate environment secrets are not hardcoded.

ranked_insights.topic: Pre-commit Hooks: dart format + flutter analyze + flutter test
ranked_insights.action: Configure PostToolUse hooks: auto dart format on .dart save, auto flutter pub get on pubspec.yaml change, auto flutter gen-l10n on .arb change. PreToolUse: warn before firebase deploy, verify signing before release build.

ranked_insights.topic: Permission Allow/Deny for Flutter CLI Commands
ranked_insights.action: Allow: flutter *, dart *, firebase emulators:*, flutterfire *, pod install, gradlew, adb, dart fix/analyze/format/build_runner. Deny: firebase deploy, firebase delete, flutter build --release, keytool -delete, rm -rf build/.

ranked_insights.topic: Performance Best Practices: const Constructors & Lazy Loading
ranked_insights.action: Enforce const constructors, localize setState to smallest subtree, use ListView.builder for lists, target 16ms frame budget, avoid Opacity widget (use AnimatedOpacity), minimize saveLayer calls.
Track onReorder deprecation, Dart dot shorthands syntax (3.38), hot reload on web (3.35), Widget Previewer tool. Update project to leverage new features.
Before implementing any feature, search pub.dev for existing packages, Firebase extensions, and community solutions. Research-before-coding workflow.

Minimal system prompt. Load Flutter/Dart conventions as skill on demand. Move widget catalog, design tokens, API schemas to skill files. Compact at phase boundaries (build success, test pass, deploy). Preserve: widget path, failing tests, firebase project ID.

Standard 4-field observation (status/summary/next_actions/artifacts) + Flutter extensions: widget_path (MaterialApp > Scaffold > MyWidget), platform_flag (android|ios|web|all), hot_reload_safe (true|false).
Configure CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions, Codemagic, or fastlane). Version bumping in pubspec.yaml. Firebase Hosting/Functions deployment with environment isolation.
Verify flutter doctor setup, ensure Visual Studio 2022 Desktop C++ workload. Firebase supports Windows via firebase_core_desktop. Hot reload works on desktop.

No overlapping flutter_test/dart_test tools (one run_tests with platform param). Parse build stderr into structured observation. Don't inline pubspec.lock. Break flutter commands into build/test/analyze/run. Always indicate affected platform(s).

custom_generate.name: flutter-tdd
custom_generate.purpose: Flutter-specific TDD extending generic tdd skill with widget test, golden test, and integration_test patterns
custom_generate.sketch: Wraps the generic tdd skill with Flutter-specific test scaffolding: widget tests using WidgetTester/pumpWidget, unit tests for repositories/viewmodels with mockito, integration_test for E2E flows. Adds golden test support, coverage threshold enforcement via flutter test --coverage, and platform-conditional test selection.

custom_generate.name: flutter-review
custom_generate.purpose: Flutter/Dart code review with framework-specific checks beyond generic code-review
custom_generate.sketch: Extends code-review with Dart-specific checks: const constructor usage, proper widget decomposition (no giant build methods), correct state management (no setState in StatelessWidget), Riverpod provider scoping, Firebase security rule validation, platform-conditional logic review, and performance anti-pattern detection (Opacity, missing keys in lists).

custom_generate.name: flutter-verify
custom_generate.purpose: Pre-completion verification loop tailored to Flutter projects
custom_generate.sketch: Runs dart analyze (zero warnings), dart format --set-exit-if-changed, flutter test --coverage (80%+ gate), flutter build (debug + platform check), pubspec.yaml version consistency, and l10n completeness check. Outputs structured pass/fail report with next_actions.

custom_generate.name: firebase-guard
custom_generate.purpose: Safety guard for Firebase operations requiring confirmation
custom_generate.sketch: PreToolUse hook that intercepts firebase deploy, firebase functions:delete, firebase firestore:delete, firebase auth:import/export. Shows target project/environment, requires explicit confirmation, logs the operation. Includes rollback hints for each operation type.

custom_generate.name: flutter-arch
custom_generate.purpose: Enforce layered MVVM architecture conventions in Flutter projects
custom_generate.sketch: Validates directory structure (lib/ui/, lib/data/, lib/di/), checks import boundaries (UI cannot import Firebase directly, must go through repository), verifies Riverpod provider placement, and ensures new files follow naming conventions. Reports violations with fix suggestions.

micro.policy: Single-action tools with explicit confirmation, rollback hint, and stop condition. Human-in-the-loop required.

medium.policy: One tool call per logical unit. Deterministic output. Auto-format on save.

operations: flutter pub get + build_runner + analyze (cold start)
macro.policy: Batch only when all steps are deterministic. Failure at any step triggers full rollback.

standard_fields: artifacts (file paths, widget names, test IDs)

error_recovery.contract: Every error includes root_cause_hint + safe_retry_instruction + stop_condition

categories.build_failure: Analyze log -> check pubspec lock -> clean -> rebuild. Stop after 2 cycles.
categories.runtime_crash: Check device logs -> isolate widget -> add error boundary. Stop if native code.
categories.test_failure: Re-run verbose -> check golden diffs -> update if intentional. Stop if >5 simultaneous failures.
categories.firebase_error: Check emulator -> verify config files -> check rules. Stop if auth token expired.
categories.platform_specific: Isolate platform -> check native build -> verify plugin compat. Stop if native SDK update needed.

conflicts_resolved.reason: No Dart-specific TDD skill exists. Generic tdd is lightest and most actionable. Custom flutter-tdd will extend it. tdd-workflow is heavier with no added Flutter value.
Language-agnostic code-review is the right base for Dart. No Dart-specific reviewer exists in ECC. Custom flutter-review will extend it. simplify is a subset.
verify is lightest pre-completion check. Custom flutter-verify will add Flutter-specific gates. verification-loop is overkill for typical Flutter tasks.
Most Flutter features are single-screen or single-service scope. plan is sufficient. Escalate to superpowers:writing-plans only for multi-milestone features.
Flutter errors (MissingPluginException, build failures) typically have clear stack traces. investigate is sufficient. Escalate to systematic-debugging only for hard-to-reproduce race conditions.
e2e skill uses Playwright (web-only). Flutter uses integration_test package instead. Keep e2e for methodology but actual test execution will use custom flutter-tdd skill with integration_test.
Critical for Flutter ecosystem. pub.dev has 40k+ packages. Always search before building custom solutions.
Both are JS/TS focused. coding-standards has some transferable patterns for Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js). frontend-patterns is React-specific. Neither is core for Dart/Flutter.
Relevance 0.55. Docker is only useful for Firebase emulator CI. Not worth installing as a default skill. Use on-demand if needed.
